bead.title: Add GET /api/projects/:project/commits endpoint
bead.description: FEAT-021 requires a commit log view in the dashboard UI. The server needs a new endpoint that returns the git log for a registered project root resolved from the project registry.
bead.acceptance: GET /api/projects/:project/commits returns git log for the project root as JSON array; supports query params ?limit= ?since= ?author=; each entry has sha, short_sha, author, date, subject, body; bead_id field is populated where closing_commit_sha matches a known bead; server_test covers the endpoint
